claim_boundary: REAL_READINESS_READY means local static contracts, command checks, clean release state, and current cross-plane evidence context passed this gate. It does not prove live customer traffic, external DPI bypass, payment settlement finality, or production SLOs without their own evidence.

current_evidence_context.claim_boundary: Real-readiness requires current cross-plane evidence context. These maps/audits are gating context, not production proof by themselves.
